channel.title: Python on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Arrans github.io

item.title: rasbt/LLMs-from-scratch
item.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

item.title: yt-dlp/yt-dlp
item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: alphacep/vosk-api
item.description: Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

item.title: ArchiveBox/ArchiveBox
item.description: 🗃 Open source self-hosted web archiving. Takes URLs/browser history/bookmarks/Pocket/Pinboard/etc., saves HTML, JS, PDFs, media, and more…

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: microsoft/ML-For-Beginners
item.description: 12 weeks, 26 lessons, 52 quizzes, classic Machine Learning for all

item.title: sqlc-dev/sqlc
item.description: Generate type-safe code from SQL

item.title: ultralytics/ultralytics
item.description: Ultralytics YOLO11 🚀

item.title: santinic/audiblez
item.description: Generate audiobooks from e-books

item.title: beetbox/beets
item.description: music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger

item.title: localstack/localstack
item.description: 💻 A fully functional local AWS cloud stack. Develop and test your cloud & Serverless apps offline

item.title: coqui-ai/TTS
item.description: 🐸💬 - a deep learning toolkit for Text-to-Speech, battle-tested in research and production

item.title: Avik-Jain/100-Days-Of-ML-Code
item.description: 100 Days of ML Coding

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: asdf-vm/asdf
item.description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

item.title: ryanoasis/nerd-fonts
item.description: Iconic font aggregator, collection, & patcher. 3,600+ icons, 50+ patched fonts: Hack, Source Code Pro, more. Glyph collections: Font Awesome, Material Design Icons, Octicons, & more

item.title: LykosAI/StabilityMatrix
item.description: Multi-Platform Package Manager for Stable Diffusion

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: LLM based autonomous agent that conducts deep local and web research on any topic and generates a long report with citations.

item.title: jstrieb/github-stats
item.description: Better GitHub statistics images for your profile, with stats from private repos too

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: frappe/erpnext
item.description: Free and Open Source Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)

item.title: spotDL/spotify-downloader
item.description: Download your Spotify playlists and songs along with album art and metadata (from YouTube if a match is found).

item.title: OfflineIMAP/offlineimap
item.description: Read/sync your IMAP mailboxes (python2) [LEGACY: move to offlineimap3]

item.title: zulip/zulip
item.description: Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.

item.title: qutebrowser/qutebrowser
item.description: A keyboard-driven, vim-like browser based on Python and Qt.

item.title: Tikam02/DevOps-Guide
item.description: DevOps Guide - Development to Production all configurations with basic notes to debug efficiently.

item.title: roboflow/supervision
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: corenting/eddrit
item.description: A lightweight alternative frontend for Reddit.

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: saulpw/visidata
item.description: A terminal spreadsheet multitool for discovering and arranging data

item.title: spotify/basic-pitch
item.description: A lightweight yet powerful audio-to-MIDI converter with pitch bend detection

item.title: apache/cloudstack
item.description: Apache CloudStack is an opensource Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) cloud computing platform

item.title: dtinth/comic-mono-font
item.description: A legible monospace font… the very typeface you’ve been trained to recognize since childhood

item.title: metacall/core
item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.title: thewh1teagle/kokoro-onnx
item.description: TTS with kokoro and onnx runtime

item.title: pimutils/vdirsyncer
item.description: 📇 Synchronize calendars and contacts.

item.title: dbcli/mycli
item.description: A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

item.title: donnemartin/saws
item.description: A supercharged AWS command line interface (CLI).

item.title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
item.description: Speech To Speech: an effort for an open-sourced and modular GPT4-o

item.title: hartwork/resolve-march-native
item.description: 🐌 Tool to determine what GCC or (experimental!) Clang flags -march=native would resolve into

item.title: aws/aws-sam-cli
item.description: CLI tool to build, test, debug, and deploy Serverless applications using AWS SAM

item.title: neonwatty/meme-search
item.description: The open source Meme Search Engine and Finder. Free and built to self-host locally with Python, Ruby, and Docker.

item.title: hifi/heisenbridge
item.description: a bouncer-style Matrix IRC bridge

item.title: yoeo/guesslang
item.description: Detect the programming language of a source code

item.title: exaile/exaile
item.description: 🎶 Cross-platform music player

item.title: louisfb01/best_AI_papers_2023
item.description: A curated list of the latest breakthroughs in AI (in 2023) by release date with a clear video explanation, link to a more in-depth article, and code.

item.title: Ebrizzzz/Youtube-playlist-to-formatted-text
item.description: A desktop application that extracts YouTube playlist transcripts and enhances them using Google’s Gemini AI models. The output is a book in any language you want.

item.title: ljvmiranda921/sprites-as-a-service
item.description: Generate your personal 8-bit avatars using Cellular Automata, a mathematical model that simulates life, survival, and extinction

item.title: FrancescoCeruti/linux-show-player
item.description: Linux Show Player - Cue player designed for stage productions

item.title: mak448a/Qtcord
item.description: Qtcord is a Discord client built with Qt aiming to bring a lightweight, native experience.

item.title: viebel/klipse
item.description: Klipse is a JavaScript plugin for embedding interactive code snippets in tech blogs.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: evildmp/BrachioGraph
item.description: BrachioGraph is an ultra-cheap (total cost of materials: €14) plotter that can be built with minimal skills.

item.title: rstemmer/musicdb
item.description: 🎧 A music manager with focus on remote access to your music by having a WebUI and providing an audio stream.

item.title: mmastrac/automedia
item.description: A set of tools for automatically managing bitrot and format in large quantities of media
